data.title: ACURE Wins a 2026 NEXTY Award
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, the recipients of the esteemed NEXTY Awards and Editor's Choice Awards have been revealed, with 37 winners of the NEXTY Awards and three Editor's Choice Awards being announced. Among the winners is ACURE, recognized as one of the 40 exceptional products at the New Hope Network 2026 Natural Products Expo West. The awards ceremony took place on March 31, 2026, highlighting outstanding contributions in the natural products industry.

data.title: Codenotary Launches the First Enterprise Agentic Network Monitoring for Security, Performance and Cost Visibility
data.description: Codenotary, a leading company in software supply chain protection, unveiled AgentMon in Houston. This new enterprise-grade monitoring tool is tailored for agentic networks, offering real-time insight into the security, performance, and cost of AI-driven agents throughout the organization. With the rise in AI adoption, agentic systems are gaining prominence as semi-autonomous software agents executing tasks on behalf of users and applications. AgentMon provides crucial visibility for enterprises in tracking these agents' operations efficiently.

data.title: WLRN Announces Sunshine Economy Summit -- Leading South Florida Voices to Tackle Growth, Housing and Jobs
data.description: A one-day conference will be held on Wednesday, September 23 at the Downtown Event Center in Fort Lauderdale. Taking place on March 31, 2026, WLRN, South Florida's NPR and PBS station, reveals the Sunshine Economy Summit, organized by the Greater Ft. Lauderdale Alliance.

data.title: Healthcare Provider Organizations Saw Net Revenue Losses From Final Denials and Bad Debt Grow by 25% in 2025, According to Kodiak Solutions’ Proprietary Data
data.description: In Indianapolis, hospitals and health systems experienced an increase in denial rates from insurers in 2025 as opposed to 2024, leading to a 25% rise in net revenue leakage.

data.title: Comporium Expands Fiber Network to Connect 1,255 Locations
data.description: In Rock Hill, South Carolina, Comporium has rolled out fiber-based, multi-gigabit internet service to over 1,250 homes and businesses in several counties. Through the installation of 138 miles of fiber, the company has invested a significant $7.8 million towards expanding its network. This enhancement allows customers to experience speeds reaching up to 5 Gigabits per second (Gbps), elevating connectivity and enhancing the quality of life particularly in rural areas. This initiative, funded by Comporium, showcases the commitment towards bridging the digital divide and improving internet access for communities in South Carolina.

data.title: Triton Digital Announces U.S. Podcast Ranker for February 2026
data.description: Triton Digital®, a technology and service provider in digital audio, podcast, and broadcast radio industries, recently unveiled its February 2026 U.S. Podcast Ranker. Covering the period from February 2 to March 1, 2026, the ranker is based on Triton’s Podcast Metrics measurement service. iHeart Audience Network secured the top spot for the month with 70.8 million Average Weekly Downloads, followed by Audioboom at #2 with 16.6 million. The report highlights the significant presence of these networks in the podcast industry.

data.title: Mesirow Again Ranked Among Top Chicago Area Wealth Management Firms
data.description: Listed as the 12th largest wealth management firm in Chicago by local assets under management, Mesirow Wealth Management has experienced substantial growth through strategic acquisitions, geographic expansion, enhanced capabilities, and recruitment of advisors. This ranking reflects the firm's ongoing efforts to expand its operations and increase its market presence.

data.title: Mitsubishi Electric US, Inc., Elevator and Escalator Division Introduces Diamond-Trac® Streamline for Passenger Elevators and Debuts New Elevator Configurator Tool
data.description: Mitsubishi Electric's Elevator and Escalator Division in Cypress, California, has launched the Diamond-Trac® Streamline Machine-Room-Less (MRL) Elevator System. This pre-engineered solution aims to streamline design choices and enhance procurement and logistics efficiency while upholding Mitsubishi Electric's quality, performance, and reliability benchmarks. Located in Cypress, California, Mitsubishi Electric US, Inc., introduces this innovative system to simplify operations and maintain high standards within the industry.

data.title: Whirl AI Emerges from Stealth to Help Enterprise IT Modernize Business Processes and Systems
data.description: Whirl AI, a company specializing in enterprise AI technology, recently emerged from stealth mode and secured a significant amount of seed funding. The $8.9 million investment was led by ICONIQ, making it one of the earliest investments by the firm. This funding will be crucial in supporting Whirl AI as they aim to establish themselves as a fundamental component in the field of enterprise AI. The announcement was made on March 31, 2026, in San Francisco.

data.title: PandaGuarantee Launches Rent Guarantor Service in New York City
data.description: New York, March 31, 2026 - Today, PandaGuarantee, a lease guarantor company from Austin, Texas, introduced its new institutional lease guarantee product to protect landlords against tenant default and enhance housing access for renters. The product aims to provide security to landlords and improve rental opportunities for tenants. This initiative comes as a response to the growing need for reliable housing solutions in the current market.

data.title: Bank Director's 2026 Risk Survey: AI Exposes Threats, Knowledge Gaps
data.description: In a recent survey conducted by Bank Director in 2026, bank executives expressed significant worries regarding various issues like artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, and credit risk. The survey, which took place in Nashville, Tennessee, on March 31, 2026, highlighted the concerns of bank leaders in the industry. The report provides insights into the concerns of executives and directors in finance, shedding light on the prevalent challenges faced by the sector. Key topics covered in the survey include AI implementation, cybersecurity threats, and credit risk management. This comprehensive analysis offers a glimpse into the top apprehensions of financial institutions, emphasizing the importance of addressing these issues in the rapidly evolving banking landscape.

data.title: Sunshine Health awards $100,000 in childcare and transportation grants to support workforce access
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on March 31, 2026, Sunshine Health, a subsidiary of Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC), has provided $100,000 in grants for childcare and transportation to five nonprofit organizations throughout the state. These grants aim to assist vulnerable individuals in over 40 locations across Florida.

data.title: The AMD Foundation Joins Last Mile Education Fund's National Semiconductor Coalition Protecting America's Engineering Talent Pipeline
data.description: An emerging industry partnership signifies a shift in the workforce strategy and enhancement of U.S. semiconductor competitiveness. Recently, in Lafayette, Colorado, on March 31, 2026, the Last Mile Education Fund revealed that the AMD Foundation became a part of the alliance. This development comes as the U.S. intensifies efforts to solidify its semiconductor sector, indicating a new approach towards workforce planning.
